exam_price_notes: INR 100 (~$1.20 USD). Free for female, SC, ST, PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen.

testing_centers.provider: SSC CBT Centres (TCS iON / regional CBT centres)
testing_centers.notes: Computer-Based Tests conducted at SSC-authorised CBT centres across India. TCS iON is the primary technology partner. Admit cards specify the allotted centre; candidates cannot choose specific venues.

id_requirements: Admit card plus one original photo ID required: Aadhaar card, voter ID, passport, driving licence, or PAN card. Photograph must be pasted on the admit card as instructed.
exam_rules: Computer-Based Test (CBT). Negative marking applies: 0.5 marks deducted per wrong answer in Tier I/most papers (1 mark deduction in some Tier II sections, as specified per notification). No electronic devices or calculators for most exams. Biometric verification at exam centre.

prerequisites.description: Indian citizen. 10+2 (Class XII) pass or equivalent. Age: 18-27 years (relaxation for OBC, SC/ST, PwBD). Posts include Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA), Postal/Sorting Assistant, Data Entry Operator (DEO).

official_study_resources.title: SSC Official Website
official_study_resources.notes: Exam notifications, syllabus, previous year papers, and admit cards.

official_study_resources.title: SSC Previous Year Question Papers
official_study_resources.notes: Free official repository of previous year question papers.
